items.title: Good News in History, May 31

items.title: Batteries That Use Sodium Instead of Lithium Could Be Low-Cost Rival to Tesla’s
items.blurb: A new study shows that a low-cost sodium-ion battery currently used in cars and large-scale energy storage systems in China matches most performance parameters and production quality found in Tesla’s lithium-ion batteries. Since sodium is much more abundant and widely available…
